TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2332-PS
Concentration Camp Flossenbuerg
Az II. Political Department/Sch.
Flossenbuerg, 22 December 1941.
To Frau Grete Staimer, Nurnberg.
In reply to your letter of 12 December 1941, enclosed please find the desired death certificate. At the same time I certify that the cremation has taken place in the crematorium of Flossenbuerg.
After the submission of a burial certificate from the competent cemetery officials the urn with the ashes can be sent to you free of charge.
The Camp Commander
By order of
(Signed) Fassbinder
Official Secretary.
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
